zh.of,Oudenaarde,East Flanders,Belgium: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫奧德納爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai於大約1160年出生在比利時海瑙特圖爾奈時，她的父親Everard III Ralph de Mortagne32歲，母親Mathilde de Béthune27歲。她於大約1182年與Gilbert II van Oudenaarde結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1219年享年61歲。

zh-hans.of,Oudenaarde,East Flanders,Belgium: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫奧德納爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai于大约1160年出生在比利时海瑙特圖爾奈时，她的父亲Everard III Ralph de Mortagne32岁，母亲Mathilde de Béthune27岁。她于大约1182年与Gilbert II van Oudenaarde结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1219年享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mortagne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francoise, Herve, Marcel, Philippe, Pierre.

French: topographic name for someone who lived on or near a hill, from Old French montaine ‘hill, (small) mountain’; or a habitational name from any of several places called (La) Montagne, named with the same word.
Shortened form of French   Lamontagne  .

variants.name: Mountain
meanings: English (Yorkshire; of Norman origin): topographic name from Middle English mountaine ‘mountain’ (Old French montagne). See Montagne .
Irish: either of Norman origin, as 1 above, or a variant of   Manton  .

English: variant of Monkton a habitational name from Monkton (Kent, Somerset), Moor Monkton and Nun Monkton (Yorkshire), Bishop Monkton (Yorkshire), or any of numerous other places called Monkton, named with Old English munuc ‘monk’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Lamontagne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Marcel, Emile, Pierre, Aime, Andre, Fernand, Normand, Gaston, Ovide, Achille.
French:
habitational name for someone from any of several places called La Montagne, or a variant of the topographic name Montagne 1, with fused feminine definite article la.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tournai
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English:  see  Turney  .

variants.name: Turney
meanings: English (of Norman origin):
habitational name from any of the places in northern France called Tournai-sur-Dive (Orne), Tournay-sur-Odon (Calvados), or Tourny (Eure), or occasionally from Tournai in Hainaut (Belgium).

perhaps occasionally an occupational name from Middle English tournei, turnai ‘lawyer’ (Anglo-Norman French tourné), or a nickname from Middle English tournei(en) ‘(to) joust, take part in a tournament’ (Old French torneier). Compare Turner .

en.lifeSummary: When Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai was born about 1160, in Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Everard III Ralph de Mortagne, was 32 and her mother, Mathilde de Béthune, was 27. She married Gilbert II van Oudenaarde about 1182. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died about 1219, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai est née environ 1160, à Tournai, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Everard III Ralph de Mortagne, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Béthune, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert II van Oudenaarde environ 1182. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1219, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai um 1160 in Tournai, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Everard III Ralph de Mortagne 32 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Béthune 27. Sie hat um 1182 Gilbert II van Oudenaarde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb um 1219 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai è nata il circa 1160 nel Tournai, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Everard III Ralph de Mortagne, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Béthune, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert II van Oudenaarde circa 1182. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì circa 1219, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.of,Oudenaarde,East Flanders,Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンオウデナアルド

ja.Of Doornick, Tournai, Hainaut, Belgium: ベルギーヘイナトトウルナイ
ja.lifeSummary: Richilde de Mortagne de Tournaiが約1160年にベルギーヘイナトトウルナイで生まれた時，父Everard III Ralph de Mortagneは32歳，母Mathilde de Béthuneは27歳であった。約1182年にGilbert II van Oudenaardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1219年に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai(이)가 대략 1160년 벨기에 하인오트 토우른아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Everard III Ralph de Mortagne(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Béthune(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1182년 Gilbert II van Oudenaarde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1219년 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1160–circa 1219: tany ho any amin'ny 1160–tany ho any amin'ny 1219

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Everard III Ralph de Mortagne, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Béthune, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert II van Oudenaarde aproximadamente 1182. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1219, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai родилась около 1160 г. в местности тоурнеи, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Everard III Ralph de Mortagne было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Béthune, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert II van Oudenaarde около 1182 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла около 1219 г. в возрасте 61 год.

sm.Abt 1160–circa 1219: e tusa o le 1160–e tusa o le 1219

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richilde de Mortagne de Tournai nació aproximadamente 1160, en Tournai, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Everard III Ralph de Mortagne, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Béthune, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Gilbert II van Oudenaarde aproximadamente 1182. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1219, a la edad de 61 años.
